dsl_rule.translation_notes: Black Candle (close < open) is the primary pattern trigger. Entry condition prioritizes breakouts below the 50-day moving average (close < sma_50) as the source text indicates these perform better. Exit when price closes back above the 50-day moving average, signaling reversal of the downside breakout. Direction is SHORT since the signal is triggered by a down candle and performs better on downside breakouts. The signal is context-dependent across different market regimes (bull/bear), so target_regime is set to ANY to allow backtest engine to analyze performance across all regimes. Exit conditions (AUTHOR_SILENT in source) are inferred as mean-reversion to the moving average.

source_rule_text: Black Candle: A reversal signal appearing as a black (down) candle, with specific performance characteristics depending on market direction and moving average relationship
